proposal_summary: A proposal by Gauntlet to adjust nine risk parameters (LTV, Liquidation Threshold, and Liquidation Bonus) across eight Aave V2 assets.

disclosed_entities.name: LendingPoolConfigurator
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: calling configureReserveAsCollateral on the LendingPoolConfigurator contract at 0x311Bb771e4F8952E6Da169b425E7e92d6Ac45756

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Sets the LTV, liquidation bonuses, and liquidation threshold ratios for specific tokens.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The proposal sets the LTV, liquidation bonuses, and liquidation threshold ratios by calling configureReserveAsCollateral on the LendingPoolConfigurator contract

claimed_complexity.reason: Standard parameter update modifying existing protocol risk settings using a single configurator function.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal is a batch update of three risk parameters to align with the the Moderate risk level

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: by calling configureReserveAsCollateral on the LendingPoolConfigurator contract

limitations: Addresses for the 8 assets being updated are not explicitly provided in the text.
